SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is made on this 15th day of October 2023.

BETWEEN:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678D), residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: twm@example.sg.

AND

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, (NRIC: S3456789E), of 45 Bukit Timah Road, Singapore 229837, phone: +65 8765 4321, email: siti.abdullah@fakesg.sg.

3. Ramasamy Muthu (UEN: 198765432Z), representing Ramasamy Holdings Pte. Ltd., with a registered office at 78 Serangoon Avenue, Singapore 556123.

WHEREAS:

A. Dr. Tan Wei Ming agrees to sell, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah agrees to purchase, 10,000 shares of Ramasamy Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456A) for the sum of SGD 500,000 (the "Purchase Price").

B. The SPA does not include any obligations to revise the project plan or evaluate the project status before the closing date.

This SPA constitutes the entire agreement between the parties. Any reference to the SPA herein includes all exhibits and schedules thereto.
